fields.title: [ticket-cli] Remove constant blocker-progress field from board show JSON recommendations
[ticket-cli] Remove constant blocker-progress field from board show JSON recommendations

fields.implementation_summary: Removed last_blocker_progress_at from ticket board show recommended_next JSON because board recommendations only forward actionable candidates where the field is constant null. Updated the focused CLI regression and documented the omission in the cross-interface best-next ordering spec and manifest.
fields.title: [ticket-cli] Remove constant blocker-progress field from board show JSON recommendations
